News | Education Workforce

Which Education Jobs Are Growing the Fastest? Mostly Non-Classroom Roles.

By Nadia Tamez-Robledo Mar 26, 2026

The approach of a new school year conjures images of teachers preparing their classrooms.

Decorative graphic that should not appear.

Federal data shows the education jobs with the most growth are supporting roles like substitute teachers, therapists and technologists.

Highest-Growth Areas

Looking at 10 education roles that will gain the most net jobs by 2034, short-term substitute teachers top the rankings.

Sign up for our newsletter

Schools also struggle to retain IT staff across all specialties and levels.

Health Workers In Demand

The rest of the list is filled by health therapy roles and technology roles.

Nadia Tamez-Robledo is a reporter covering K-12 education for EdSurge.
